title: Model CLI harness preflight and state isolation
goal: Implement #673 by adding explicit model-CLI harness preflight and optional provider state isolation so evaluation failures are classified before model output is scored.
non_goals: Do not require installing PowerShell 7 or authenticating an isolated Copilot home in tests.
Do not run paid model evaluations as proof for this implementation slice.

intent.outcome: Make the harness record executable, shell, package-CLI, and provider-state prerequisites before execution.
intent.constraints: Keep the harness dry-run first and avoid storing local absolute paths in checked-in docs/issues.
intent.latitude: Add suite adapter fields, runner preflight output, docs, and unit tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate before changing Copilot authentication behavior beyond opt-in environment controls.

execution.proof: Run focused harness tests, planning surface check, and make check.

invariants: No external model execution during tests.
Preflight must distinguish environment-blocked runs from model/package failures.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Model CLI dogfooding should produce trustworthy evidence about package usability across agent CLIs.

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.literal request: Can you fix #673 yourself? The issue body contains absolute paths on my local machine, which is bad.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Sanitize the issue and implement harness preflight/isolation so future model evaluations are not polluted by environment confounds.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add adapter preflight fields, environment handling, result status classification, docs, and tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Adding a product CLI command, benchmark database, or CI integration.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Package runtime behavior outside the harness.

execution_run.what happened: Sanitized #673 issue body and implemented adapter preflight, environment-blocked result classification, optional provider-home isolation, Copilot prerequisites, docs, and tests.
execution_run.scope touched: model CLI harness script, Copilot suite config, maintainer docs, harness tests
execution_run.validations run: focused harness tests, dry-run and execute-blocked Copilot harness checks, planning surface checker, make check

finished_run_review.config compliance: used checked-in planning and package archive flow

proof_report.validation proof: make check passed; focused harness tests passed; Copilot execute-mode now reports environment-blocked when pwsh is missing without calling the model.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Fix #673 and remove local absolute paths from the issue body.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Issue body no longer contains local home-directory paths; harness preflight/isolation behavior is implemented and tested.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The issue body was sanitized and the harness now records/prevents environment-confounded model execution by default.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: tests, docs, suite config, and make check output.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Preflight fails to classify missing adapter prerequisites or provider-home isolation regresses.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
